title: react-instantsearch-nextjs 0.3.13 issues
body:
### 🐛 Current behavior

After updating package to 0.3.13 I am receiving a ton of errors in server logs.

Everything seems fine on the frontend except this is causing a 500 error when page is returned. (Page works fine but 500 code with html returned)

I tried removing my custom router but still having the same issue.

It seems to be related to the useConnector hook.

`TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'state')
    at VirtualSearchBox (./src/components/Search.tsx:1208:71)
digest: "1146631733"
 ⨯ TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'state')
    at VirtualClearRefinements (./src/components/Search.tsx:1212:78)
digest: "591784411"
 ⨯ TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'state')
    at VirtualRefinementList (./src/components/Search.tsx:1216:75)
digest: "2406044486"
 ⨯ TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'state')
    at VirtualRefinementList (./src/components/Search.tsx:1216:75)
digest: "2406044486"
 ⨯ TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'state')
    at VirtualSortBy (./src/components/Search.tsx:1220:68)
digest: "1775276621"
 ⨯ TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'state')
    at VirtualPagination (./src/components/Search.tsx:1224:72)
digest: "3596797007"
 ⨯ TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'state')
    at VirtualHierarchicalMenu (./src/components/Search.tsx:1228:78)
digest: "2688870463"
 ⨯ TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'state')
    at VirtualMenu (./src/components/Search.tsx:1232:66)
digest: "2879452850"
 ⨯ Internal error: TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'state')
    at eval (./node_modules/.pnpm/react-instantsearch-core@7.13.2_algoliasearch@5.7.0_react@18.3.1/node_modules/react-instantsearch-core/dist/es/hooks/useConnector.js:105:23)`


### 🔍 Steps to reproduce

Upgrade react-instantsearch-nextjs version 0.3.12 to 0.3.13

### Live reproduction

none

### 💭 Expected behavior

Should work as normal

### Package version

react-instantsearch-nextjs 0.3.13

### Operating system

_No response_

### Browser

_No response_
